name: conduit-browser
description: One-to-eight-pane Electron browser with explicit eight-pane synchronization, automatic 80% scaling for dense layouts, configurable palettes, isolated routes, and a quieter local welcome page.

scripts.check: node --check src/main-entry-v17.js && node --check src/main-v16.js && node --check src/adblocker.js && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/core.js && node --check src/tor-manager.js && node --check src/tor-bridge.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/page-preload.js && node --check src/page-preload-v17.js && node --check src/renderer/interaction-guard.js && node --check src/renderer/app-v11.js && node --check src/renderer/ui-v14.js && node --check src/renderer/ui-v15.js && node --check src/renderer/ui-v16.js && node --check src/renderer/ui-v17.js && npm test
